category_sources: source_facts.description says FirefoxPWA installs, manages, and uses Progressive Web Apps in Mozilla Firefox; official PWAsForFirefox user guide documents the firefoxpwa console program for managing web apps.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses PWAsForFirefox; source_facts.repo points to filips123/PWAsForFirefox and executable is firefoxpwa.
docs_sources: Official PWAsForFirefox site provides user guide and console guide for the firefoxpwa program.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/filips123/PWAsForFirefox; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official console guide describe installing, launching, and managing Firefox Progressive Web Apps with firefoxpwa.
